description: Modify a single segment by ID.

keywords.name: control-point-remove
keywords.description: Add one or more control points at locations v3 , a 3D coordinate vector ( \(u, v, w\) ). If local is used, then the locations are in a coordinate system defined by the segment, where \(x\) goes from end 1 at 0.0 to end 2 at 1.0, and \(y\) is normal to that. Remove all control points. Move the control point with index i to location v3 , a 3D coordinate vector ( \(u, v, w\) ). If local is used, then the segment local coordinate system is used (see add above). Remove one or more control points.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the group name s1 in slot s2 (if supplied) to the segment. The segment is removed from the group/slot if remove is present. If the slot keyword is omitted, the slot is set the slot named Default .

keywords.name: ratio
keywords.description: Set the ratio f (a number between 0.1 and 10.1 ), which is used to distribute zone lengths along the segment (each zone will be f of the size of the zone preceding it).

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Set the number of zones on the segment.

keywords.name: type-curve
keywords.description: Specify the curve type of the segment. This is the default type (a line).
